name: Spaghetti with Superb Meat Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Long, slow simmering of meat and herbs produces the base for this incomparable sauce.
2. Season Beef roast with salt; dredge with flour.
3. In a Dutch oven, brown slowly on all sides in hot olive oil.
4. Add hot water; cover and cook slowly for 3 hours or until meat almost falls apart. Tear into small pieces with a fork.
5. Add remaining ingredients except spaghetti and cheese (olive oil, mushrooms, spices).
6. Cover tightly and simmer for 2 more hours, stirring occasionally.
7. Remove the cover and continue cooking until sauce thickens to desired consistency.
8. Cook spaghetti following package directions; allow 1 pound for 4 servings.
9. Ladle sauce over spaghetti.
10. Top with cheese.
11. Makes about 3 1/2 quarts sauce, enough for 4 pounds spaghetti. NOTE: Since you may not need such a large quantity of spaghetti, freeze extra sauce in half-pint, pint or quart freezer jars and use as needed. I prefer to use rump roast, but chuck or round is acceptable.
